raw_consumer_statement:
I made an online purchase from XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year>. 
Order number : XXXX. 
The item purchased was the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX in. XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. 

XXXX XXXX delivered the wrong item ( XXXX model ) and the package arrived incomplete, missing a major required component that prevents installation. 

I attempted to return the item, but XXXX XXXX incorrectly classified the return as Buyers Remorse, which is false. This is a case of : Wrong product version delivered Missing parts Incomplete XXXX XXXX XXXX then refused the return and blocked the transaction through The Retail Equation ( TRE ), which prevented me from processing the refund. 

I opened a case with XXXX XXXX ( XXXX XXXX ), and they confirmed confusion about the correct model. The item is not compatible with my XXXX mower and is missing parts. 

I paid using my Home Depot Credit Card, and I am requesting CFPB assistance to resolve this issue. 
I am asking for : 1. Correction of the return classification 2. Approval of the return 3. Refund of {$1700.00}, since the product was not as described and arrived incomplete. 



I have attempted to contact XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ( email sent XX/XX/year> at XXXX AM ) and have received no response. 

I am requesting CFPB intervention to resolve this matter.
